---
title: "Biblioview Dynamic Portal"
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: false
# We load DT to bundle the required JavaScript/CSS assets into the final HTML file
library(DT)
```

<div class="container-fluid" style="margin-top: 20px;">
  <!-- Setup / Configuration Panel -->
  <div id="config-panel" class="card bg-light mb-4">
    <div class="card-body">
      <h5 class="card-title">Connect to Zotero Library</h5>
      <div class="row g-3">
        <div class="col-md-3">
          <label class="form-label">Zotero Group ID</label>
          <input type="text" id="zotero-group" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., 6536329">
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <label class="form-label">API Key (Read Access)</label>
          <input type="password" id="zotero-key" class="form-control" placeholder="Zotero API Key">
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
          <label class="form-label">Filter Keyword (Optional)</label>
          <input type="text" id="zotero-search" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., abstract keyword">
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-2 d-flex align-items-end">
          <button id="fetch-btn" class="btn btn-primary w-100" onclick="triggerManualFetch()">Fetch Library</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="status-message" class="text-muted mt-2 small"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main Output Table Area -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-body">
      <table id="bib-table" class="table table-striped table-bordered" style="width:100%">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Collection</th>
            <th>Authors</th>
            <th>Year</th>
            <th>Title</th>
            <th>DOI / Link</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Load DataTables Dependencies directly from CDN inside the static page -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.1/css/buttons.bootstrap5.min.css">
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.0.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.1/js/dataTables.buttons.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.1/js/buttons.bootstrap5.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jszip/3.10.1/jszip.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.1/js/buttons.html5.min.js"></script>

<script>
let dataTableInstance = null;

$(document).ready(function() {
  // Initialize an empty DataTable with export tools on load
  dataTableInstance = $('#bib-table').DataTable({
    dom: 'Bfrtip',
    buttons: ['copy', 'csv', 'excel'],
    pageLength: 15,
    columns: [
      { data: 'collection' },
      { data: 'authors' },
      { data: 'year' },
      { data: 'title' },
      { data: 'doi' }
    ]
  });

  // Check URL arguments for automatic processing
  const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const group = urlParams.get('group');
  const key = urlParams.get('key');
  const searchQ = urlParams.get('q');

  if (group && key) {
    $('#zotero-group').val(group);
    $('#zotero-key').val(key);
    if (searchQ) $('#zotero-search').val(searchQ);
    
    // Hide the configuration form panel to provide a clean dashboard dashboard look
    $('#config-panel').hide();
    fetchZoteroData(group, key, searchQ);
  }
});

function triggerManualFetch() {
  const group = $('#zotero-group').val().trim();
  const key = $('#zotero-key').val().trim();
  const searchQ = $('#zotero-search').val().trim();
  
  if (!group || !key) {
    alert('Please enter both a Group ID and an API Key.');
    return;
  }
  fetchZoteroData(group, key, searchQ);
}

function fetchZoteroData(group, key, keyword) {
  $('#status-message').text('Connecting to Zotero API and retrieving items...');
  
  // Build Zotero API query endpoint string. 
  // We limit down to specific fields to reduce network payloads.
  let url = `https://api.zotero.org/groups/${group}/items?v=3&format=json&include=data`;
  if (keyword) {
    url += `&q=${encodeURIComponent(keyword)}`;
  }

  fetch(url, {
    headers: {
      'Zotero-API-Key': key
    }
  })
  .then(response => {
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error('API Authorization failed or group not found.');
    return response.json();
  })
  .then(items => {
    const parsedRows = [];
    
    // Process the raw items using the exact same logical rules from your R package
    items.forEach(item => {
      const d = item.data;
      if (!d || d.itemType === 'attachment' || d.itemType === 'note') return;

      // Extract year
      let year = 'n.d.';
      if (d.date) {
        const match = d.date.match(/\d{4}/);
        if (match) year = match[0];
      }

      // Replicate the exact R-Package Author mapping behavior
      let authorsStr = 'Unknown';
      if (d.creators && d.creators.length > 0) {
        const names = d.creators.map(c => {
          if (c.lastName) return c.lastName;
          if (c.name) return c.name;
          return null;
        }).filter(Boolean);

        if (names.length === 1) {
          authorsStr = names[0];
        } else if (names.length === 2) {
          authorsStr = names.join(' & ');
        } else if (names.length > 2) {
          authorsStr = names.slice(0, -1).join(', ') + ', & ' + names[names.length - 1];
        }
      }

      // Replicate DOI / URL link string mapping
      let doiVal = d.DOI ? d.DOI : '';
      if (doiVal.includes('10.')) {
        doiVal = '10.' + doiVal.split('10.')[1];
      }
      const finalLink = doiVal ? `https://doi.org/${doiVal}` : (d.url ? d.url : '');
      const linkMarkup = finalLink ? `<a href="${finalLink}" target="_blank">${doiVal ? doiVal : 'Link'}</a>` : '';

      parsedRows.push({
        collection: d.collections && d.collections.length > 0 ? 'Assigned' : 'Root',
        authors: authorsStr,
        year: year,
        title: d.title || 'Untitled',
        doi: linkMarkup
      });
    });

    // Wipe the table view clean and replace with the parsed elements instantly
    dataTableInstance.clear().rows.add(parsedRows).draw();
    $('#status-message').text(`Successfully processed ${parsedRows.length} publication records.`);
  })
  .catch(err => {
    $('#status-message').html(`<span class="text-danger">Error: ${err.message}</span>`);
    $('#config-panel').show(); // Show login panels back up if automated pipeline hits wall
  });
}
</script>
